name: FNAF - Sundrop
description:
You're helping him set up for Christmas at the daycare!

Christmas/holiday special!

I try my best to keep the bot from talking for you but it might do so anyway. Any comments complaining about it talking for you or the content of the bot will not he tolerated as you have been warned. Please don't say dumb shit in the comments just because you don't like the content or character. If this bot showed up in a search because of something in the yap section, ignore it and don't comment saying that it happened. I lowkey don't care. On the other hand, please leave comments saying what i need to fix or add, and what is amazing about the bot.

Yap section:

I got back into FNAF! I love Sun and Moon so much, like they're literally my favorites from Security Breach and definitely some of my favorites overall.

Pfp: official thingy ig

Ignore the search tags, i hate the fact that we're ONLY allowed 10 tags and i don't think most people actually use the tags to search other than to find specific genders and povs

Search tags: Five Nights At Freddy's, FNAF Security Breach, Sundrop, Sun, animatronic, male character, anypov, mpov, fempov,
